title: payment — realtime broadcast channels
description: Five broadcast channel families for live UI updates. Tenant-level channels for admin dashboards; customer-scoped channels for the customer's own payment method + payment status UI. Reverb driver (Laravel Reverb) is the default transport; the notifications module handles fanout. Provider config broadcasts NEVER carry decrypted config values.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.payments
channels.description: Tenant-wide payment activity stream. Sink for the payment dashboard showing captures + intent lifecycle + disputes.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (finance role OR admin OR owner)
channels.notes: Payload is trimmed to non-confidential fields (see data-classes.json). amount_cents visible to admin + finance; support role sees bucketed.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.payments.disputes
channels.description: Dispute lifecycle live updates. Powers the ops dispute queue view.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (finance role OR admin OR owner)
channels.notes: Every PaymentDisputeOpened fires a companion push notification via the notifications module (cannot-opt-out). The channel is for the UI live-update; the notification is for the human alert.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.payments.providers
channels.description: Provider-scoped health + config activity. Powers the per-provider status chip + circuit-breaker state indicator in the payment dashboard.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (finance role OR admin OR owner)
channels.notes: Config field NEVER broadcast (encrypted at rest; the channel does not decrypt). Only the fact-of-change is broadcast; the SDUI re-fetches to get updated (redacted) config view.

channels.name: customer.{customerId}.payments
channels.description: Per-customer payment activity stream. Sinks the customer's own payment SDK — used to reactively update the customer UI when a 3DS2 challenge completes or a background async provider event resolves the intent state.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND user_matches (or athlete guardian matches)
channels.notes: Auto-scoped by resolving customer_id from auth.user. Customer sees ONLY their own events. Payload trimmed to what the customer UI needs (no admin-only fields like risk_score).

channels.name: customer.{customerId}.payment-methods
channels.description: Per-customer saved payment method events. Powers the customer's payment methods UI live-updates.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND user_matches (or athlete guardian matches)
channels.notes: Method summary broadcast (brand + last4 + exp); provider_reference_id NEVER broadcast (encrypted at rest).
